channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: California’s slow ballot count makes it a target for critics. It doesn’t mean elections are rigged
item.description: Days after the state’s primary, California voters are in a familiar position -- waiting to find out which candidates will go on to the general election in their most high-profile races, for governor and Los Angeles mayor.

item.title: Homicide convictions reversed for Colorado paramedics who injected ketamine into Elijah McClain
Murder charge dropped for Arkansas sheriff nominee who killed daughter’s alleged abuser
